reference: I have a six-year-old who is sick and I have her on amoxicillin four hundred milligrams. I am giving her six point two five milliliters by mouth every eight hours. She has a bad cough, and I was wondering if I can give her guaifenesin-codeine syrup one teaspoonful by mouth every four hours if needed. I was wondering if you could mix those two together. Thank you.
text: I have a six-year-old. She is sick, and I have her on amoxicillin 400 milligrams. I am giving her 6.25 milliliters by mouth every eight hours. She has a bad cough, and I was wondering if I can give her guaifenesin codeine syrup one teaspoonful by mouth every four hours if needed. I was wondering if you could mix those two together. Thank you.
